scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: Northwestern reviews a student’s overall high school curriculum in context and asks the counselor recommendation to speak to that curriculum and the student’s involvement within the high school environment.
areas.detail: Northwestern reviews a student’s overall high school curriculum in context and asks the counselor recommendation to speak to that curriculum and the student’s involvement within the high school environment.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: Northwestern requires two letters of recommendation: one from a high school counselor and one from a teacher in a core subject area, ideally from junior or senior year.
areas.detail: Northwestern requires two letters of recommendation: one from a high school counselor and one from a teacher in a core subject area, ideally from junior or senior year.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: Northwestern requires a 300-word contextual question for Common Application and Coalition with Scoir applicants, plus one or two additional short supplemental responses of under 200 words each.
areas.detail: Northwestern requires a 300-word contextual question for Common Application and Coalition with Scoir applicants, plus one or two additional short supplemental responses of under 200 words each.
